Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX - Freestyle
Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam Stadium Championship Series Red returns to Houston as Adam Anderson continues to chip away at Camden Murphy’s series points lead. Will Bakugan Dragonoid remain on top or will Grave Digger regain the lead, and Tom Meents returns to the city where he debuted Max-D twenty years ago.
Video.title: NRG Stadium - Houston, TX

Image.alt: NRG Stadium - Houston, TX
NRG Stadium - Houston, TX
NRG Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series Red returns to St. Louis for round 4 of 26. Only 3 points separate Bakugan Dragonoid’s Camden Murphy from Grave Digger’s Adam Anderson. Will truck gremlins continue to plague Anderson and can Murphy get his second consecutive Event Championship?
Video.title: The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO

Image.alt: The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO
The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO
The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO

Qualcomm Stadium - San Diego, CA - Racing

Video.summary: It's time for round 2 of Arena Championship Series West! Fan favorites Weston Anderson of Grave Digger and Brianna Mahon of Scooby-Doo hit the dirt alongside all your other favorite trucks and drivers!
Video.title: Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT

Image.alt: Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT
Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT
Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT

Video.summary: Monster Jam’s legendary family all began with Dennis Anderson and Grave Digger. That legacy lives on today with the 4 Anderson kids including the latest star, Weston Anderson. Take a look back at some of the family’s best moments throughout the years.
Video.title: Anderson Family Mega Highlight Reel Compilation

Image.alt: Anderson Family Mega Highlight Reel Compilation
Anderson Family Mega Highlight Reel Compilation
Anderson Family Mega Highlight Reel Compilation

Video.summary: The Monster Jam series closes out with the world finals XXI at Camping World Stadium in Orlando, Florida on May 21–22, 2022.
Video.title: World finals XXI - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL

Image.alt: World finals XXI - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL
World finals XXI - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL
World finals XXI - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL

Video.summary: Feel the ground shake as the 2026 Monster Jam season kicks off with a high-octane battle in Salt Lake City. Watch legendary icons like Grave Digger and Megalodon go head-to-head against reigning World Finals champion Blake Granger in Monster Mutt Dalmatian and Armando Castro, who is celebrating 25 years of El Toro Loco. From the precision of the Two-Wheel Skills Challenge to the adrenaline-fueled chaos of a Freestyle finale packed with backflips and drifting, these elite athletes push 12,000-pound machines to their absolute limits.
Video.title: Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT

Image.alt: Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT
Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT
Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT

Video.summary: Experience the raw power of the Arena Championship Series West as Monster Jam Replay takes over the Golden One Center in Sacramento, California. Round 4 features high-stakes action starting with JCB Racing, where Armando Castro and El Toro Loco battle through the bracket to defeat Carson Williams in Thunderoarus for the racing title. The excitement continues with the Great Clips Skills Challenge, featuring technical maneuvers and two-wheel stunts. The night reaches its peak during Freestyle, where Blake Granger and Monster Mutt Dalmatian deliver a spectacular performance, including a signature backflip, to sweep the competition. After a fierce battle against top competitors like Matt Cody in Grave Digger, Blake Granger is crowned the BKT Overall Event Champion.
Video.title: Golden One Center - Sacramento, CA

Image.alt: Golden One Center - Sacramento, CA
Golden One Center - Sacramento, CA
Golden One Center - Sacramento, CA
